languages.text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

languages.text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.
languages.original_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (minimum 0) check or fall prone. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. After, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. After, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} bonus (minimum 0) or fall prone. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

languages.text:
Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (минимум 0) или {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}упасть{/g}. Затем масло удаляется из клетки.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (минимум 0) или {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}упасть{/g}. Затем масло удаляется из клетки.

Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (минимум 0) или {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}упасть{/g}. Затем масло удаляется из клетки.

languages.text:
Cuando se mueve en combate, el usuario crea una zona cubierta de aceite en todas las casillas que recorre. Esta zona dura 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (mínimo 0) o será {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}. Luego el aceite desaparece de esa casilla.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
Cuando se mueve en combate, el usuario crea una zona cubierta de aceite en todas las casillas que recorre. Esta zona dura 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (mínimo 0) o será {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}. Luego el aceite desaparece de esa casilla.

languages.text: Während er sich im Kampf bewegt, erzeugt der Nutzer einen Ölfilm auf allen Feldern, die er passiert. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} bestehen (min. 0), um nicht {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} auf den Boden zu fallen. Danach wird das Feld vom Öl befreit.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text: Während er sich im Kampf bewegt, erzeugt der Nutzer einen Ölfilm auf allen Feldern, die er passiert. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} bestehen (min. 0), um nicht {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} auf den Boden zu fallen. Danach wird das Feld vom Öl befreit.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, çatışmada hareket ederken geçtiği tüm hücrelerde yağla kaplı bir alan oluşturur. Bu alan, 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır.
Bir düşman bu alana girdiğinde +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusa{/g} (minimum 0) sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Ardından o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Bir düşman bu alana girdiğinde +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusa{/g} (minimum 0) sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Ardından o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.

languages.text:
Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}, après quoi l'huile disparaît de la case sur laquelle il se trouve.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}, après quoi l'huile disparaît de la case sur laquelle il se trouve.

languages.text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。随后清除该格的油污。
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则就会陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。随后清除该格的油污。

languages.text:
戦闘中の移動中、使用者は移動するすべてのマスに油で覆われた領域を作る。この領域は2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g} 続く。
敵がその中に入った場合、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗テスト{/g} に+{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g} （最低0） で合格するか、{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}うつ伏せ{/g} 倒れなければならない。その後、油 は独房から取り除かれる。
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|6322558474614e31a0e611bf7799d7f9} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0) or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.
